title: Pack of 40 Disposable Air Fryer Liners Round Greaseproof Parchment Paper Sheets 20cm
features: Mess-Free Cooking: Our liners keep your air fryer clean, eliminating grease splatters and food residue.
Easy Clean Up: Simply dispose of the liner after use for hassle-free cleaning—no more scrubbing!
Perfect Fit: Designed to fit most air fryer baskets, ensuring a snug and secure placement every time.
Time-Saving: Spend less time cleaning and more time enjoying your delicious air-fried meals.
Value Pack: With 40 liners included, you'll have an ample supply to last for multiple cooking sessions.
description: Pack of 40 round disposable air fryer liners. This pack of 20cm round air fryer lining are ideal for cooking up a wide variety of foods. The liners provide fantastic air circulation and even heat distribution around your air fryer ensuring your food is cooked to perfection every time. Each parchment sheet liner is heat resistant up to 220 degrees, non-toxic and tasteless ensuring no nasty tastes are left on your food after cooking. The raised sides keep oils and grease contained, helping you to keep your air fryer clean ready for your next home cooked meal. Non stick and multi purpose, the disposable liners can be used in the air fryer, oven, microwave or steamer, or even as a serving basket for nibbles. Perfect for cooking all kinds of foods such as chips, chicken portions, vegetables, fish, the possibilities are endless. Each liner measures approximately 23cm in diameter across the top, 20cm across the based and 4.5cm in depth.
